title: Amara's Counting Sounds
synopsis: Baby Amara discovers different sounds around her home while learning to count from one to five. Each sound creates beautiful visible patterns that dance through the air.

pages.text: One clock goes TICK TOCK! Amara claps her hands with joy.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits near a wall clock, with steady blue rectangular pulses floating through the air representing the tick-tock sound
illustration.alt: Baby Amara clapping next to a clock with blue sound waves

pages.text: Two birds sing TWEET TWEET! Pretty yellow dots dance in the air.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes looks up at birds outside a window, with small golden dots swirling upward representing the tweeting sounds
illustration.alt: Amara watching birds with golden sound dots

pages.text: Three cars go BEEP BEEP HONK! Red zigzag lines zoom past the window.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes peers out a window at cars, with bold red jagged zigzag lines racing horizontally across the scene representing car horns
illustration.alt: Amara at window with red zigzag car horn sounds

pages.text: Four raindrops go PITTER PATTER! Tiny blue circles fall down.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes watches rain through glass, with delicate light blue circles cascading downward representing the gentle rain sounds
illustration.alt: Amara watching rain with blue circle sounds

pages.text: Five toys go RATTLE SHAKE! Rainbow swirls spin all around Amara. She giggles at all her counting sounds!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits surrounded by colorful toys, with vibrant rainbow spiral swirls rotating around her representing the rattling and shaking sounds
illustration.alt: Happy Amara playing with toys and rainbow sound swirls

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: What sound does the clock make?
questions.explanation: The clock goes TICK TOCK with blue rectangular sound pulses!

questions.question: How many birds does Amara hear?
questions.explanation: Amara hears two birds that go TWEET TWEET with golden dots!

questions.question: What color are the rain sounds?
questions.explanation: The raindrops make tiny blue circles when they go PITTER PATTER!
